info.title: Chat Engine HTTP REST API
info.description: RESTful HTTP API for Chat Engine client operations. Used for CRUD operations, queries, control operations, and streaming responses via HTTP chunked transfer encoding (newline-delimited JSON).

delete.description: Delete a session (soft by default, hard if requested). Soft delete is recoverable.

parameters.name: deletion_type
parameters.description: Type of deletion: soft (recoverable) or hard (permanent)

post.description: Mark session as soft-deleted (recoverable within retention period)
Restore a session from soft-deleted state back to active

409.description: Conflict - session not in soft-deleted state

post.summary: Generate session summary with streaming response

delete.description: Permanently delete a message and cascade delete all associated reactions. Validates session ownership via JWT identity before deletion.

SessionCreateRequest.description: Request to create a new chat session. tenant_id, user_id, and client_id are extracted from JWT.

file_ids.description: Array of file UUIDs (stable identifiers from File Storage Service). Clients must implement separate integration with File Storage Service to display files.

type.description: URI reference identifying the problem type

title.description: Short, human-readable summary of the problem type

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

instance.description: URI reference identifying the specific occurrence

trace_id.description: W3C trace ID for support correlation

file_ids.description: Array of file UUIDs attached to this message (stable identifiers from File Storage Service)

deleted.description: Confirmation that the message was deleted

scheduled_hard_delete_at.description: When soft deleted, shows scheduled permanent deletion time

tags.name: Search Operations
tags.description: Search messages within sessions and across sessions
